user.title: RCE PSE Configuration
user.description: Set up the RCE PSE integration

data_description.lite_mode: A simplified mode focused on ensuring PSE data is fetched and exposed in the attributes of the available sensors. It publishes the current price, tomorrow price and Energy Compass sensors. All analyses, statistics, windows, thresholds and automations can then be built by the user from that data.
data_description.use_hourly_prices: Useful in net-billing settlements due to prosumer metering with hourly accuracy despite 15-minute prices. In this mode, the average price for a given hour is calculated from published quarter-hour prices. Settlement according to Art. 4b sec. 11 of the Ustawa o OZE
data_description.use_gross_prices: When enabled, all prices are converted to gross using VAT (currently 23%), so you do not need to apply VAT in automations

data_description.enable_cheapest_window: When disabled, the integration does not publish cheap-window sensors and does not calculate this window.
data_description.cheapest_time_window_start: Start of the search range. Same calendar day only.
data_description.cheapest_time_window_end: End of the search range. Use 00:00 here to mean end of that calendar day.
data_description.cheapest_window_duration_hours: Length of the continuous window to find. Must fit inside the search range.

data_description.enable_expensive_window: When disabled, the integration does not publish expensive-window sensors and does not calculate this window.
data_description.expensive_time_window_start: Start of the search range. Same calendar day only.
data_description.expensive_time_window_end: End of the search range. Value 00:00 means end of that calendar day.
data_description.expensive_window_duration_hours: Length of the continuous window to find. Must fit inside the search range.

data_description.enable_second_expensive_window: When disabled, the integration does not publish second-expensive-window sensors and does not calculate this window.
data_description.second_expensive_time_window_start: Start of the search range. Same calendar day only.
data_description.second_expensive_time_window_end: End of the search range. Value 00:00 means end of that calendar day.
data_description.second_expensive_window_duration_hours: Length of the continuous window to find. Must fit inside the search range.

data_description.enable_low_price_threshold: When disabled, the integration does not publish below-threshold sensors and does not calculate this threshold.
data_description.enable_high_price_threshold: When disabled, the integration does not publish above-threshold sensors and does not calculate this threshold.

error.invalid_time_window: Invalid search range: end must be after start on the same day, unless end is 00:00 (end of day).
error.invalid_duration: Duration must use 15-minute steps from 00:15 to 24:00.
error.duration_exceeds_search_window: Duration is longer than the configured search range.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single configuration of RCE PSE is allowed.

data_description.lite_mode: A simplified mode focused on ensuring PSE data is fetched and exposed in the attributes of the available sensors. It publishes the current price, tomorrow price and Energy Compass sensors. All analyses, statistics, windows, thresholds and automations can then be built by the user from that data.
data_description.price_unit: Unit for all price sensors. WARNING! After changing, statistics may mix old and new units. Update automations and the low and high price thresholds when switching between PLN/MWh and PLN/kWh
data_description.use_hourly_prices: Useful in net-billing settlements due to prosumer metering with hourly accuracy despite 15-minute prices. rce_pse_tomorrow_second_expensive_window.name: Second Expensive Window Avg Price Tomorrow
